message:
fix(writing): CMA-ES visualization improvements

Enhance CMA-ES visualization component with better mobile responsiveness
and improved styling.

cmaes-visualizations.tsx:
- Improve mobile layout with responsive padding
- Add better spacing for control elements
- Enhance visual hierarchy in step indicators
- Improve responsive grid behavior
- Refine button and input styling for touch targets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
